title: Modrinth Plugin Loader
description: this is a simple plugin that can be used to test or deploy any other plugin on modrinth!
body:
Modrinth Plugin Loader lets you load plugins directly from Modrinth while your Minecraft server is running—no restart required. Just use the /load <modrinth-url> command and watch your server evolve in real time.
Designed for PaperMC 1.20+, this plugin fetches .jar files from Modrinth, places them in your /plugins folder, and enables them automatically. It filters for Paper-compatible plugins and includes optional auto-reload functionality for seamless integration.
Perfect for server admins who want modular control, live updates, and a streamlined way to expand their server without downtime. Compatible with Paper, Spigot, Purpur, and Folia (experimental). Built with simplicity, speed, and mythic modularity in mind.
Requires Java 17+ and internet access for Modrinth API.
